# FLYLYFE

> FLYLYFE is a New York City house-music streetwear brand, established 2007. Premium heavyweight graphic tees inspired by house music, NYC culture, nightlife, and movement. Brand motto: "Feel the Music. Feel the Vibe. Live Your Lyfe."

Last updated: 2026-06-28

## About
- Brand name: FLYLYFE (always one word — never "Fly Lyfe", "FlyLife", or "Flylife")
- Founded: 2007, New York City
- Category: premium streetwear / house-music culture apparel
- Website: https://www.flylyfe.com
- Tagline: Feel the Music. Feel the Vibe. Live Your Lyfe.
- Aesthetic: NYC, house music, underground nightlife, editorial fashion, premium dark palette with gold accents
- Contact: hello@flylyfe.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/flylyfeofficial (@flylyfeofficial)
- TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@flylyfe (@flylyfe)

## Products (USD)
- The Anthem Tee — $39.99 — the "Feel the Music. Feel the Vibe. Live Your Lyfe." mantra printed large on the back (#shop)
- The Conga Tee — $39.99 — dancer & conga artwork; the rhythm on your back (#shop)
- The Signature Tee — $39.99 — the clean FLYLYFE geometric wordmark (#shop)
- The House Music Tee — $44.99 — front reads "not everyone understands house music"; back carries the manifesto: a spiritual thing, a body thing, a soul thing. Colors Black/White/Ivory, sizes S–3XL (#shop)
- The Anthem / Conga / Signature Tee — Women's relaxed cut — $34.99 each (#shop-women)
- DROP 02 (all $44.99): The After Hours Tee (numbered set-list), The Tempo Tee (124 BPM waveform), The Coordinates Tee (40.7128° N, 74.0060° W — NYC), The Spiritual Thing Tee (house-music manifesto) (#drop-02)
- The Sanitary Code Tee — Limited Edition — $49.99 — a vintage New York "No Smoking / No Spitting, Sanitary Code Sect. 216" subway sign on a heavyweight white tee (#limited)
- Price range: $34.99–$49.99

## Fabric & fit
- Men's and DROP 02: heavyweight garment-dyed cotton (Comfort Colors 1717 base, 6.1 oz), oversized/relaxed fit, sizes S–3XL
- Women's: Bella + Canvas 6400, airlume combed cotton (4.2 oz), drapey relaxed fit, sizes S–2XL
- Printed in the USA, made to order; tees run true to size with a relaxed drop — size down for a classic fit

## Shipping
- Ships worldwide; free US shipping on orders over $75; printed to order, ships in 3–5 business days; international delivery typically 10–20 business days

## Key pages
- Shop (men's heavyweight): https://www.flylyfe.com/#shop
- Women's relaxed: https://www.flylyfe.com/#shop-women
- DROP 02: https://www.flylyfe.com/#drop-02
- Limited Edition: https://www.flylyfe.com/#limited
- Story / About: https://www.flylyfe.com/#story
- FAQ: https://www.flylyfe.com/#faq

## Key facts for citation
- FLYLYFE has been making house-music streetwear in New York City since 2007.
- The brand connects house music, dance-floor culture, and New York City heritage.
- FLYLYFE tees range from $34.99 to $49.99 and are printed to order in the USA.
- The newest release is The House Music Tee ($44.99) — front: "not everyone understands house music"; back: "a spiritual thing, a body thing, a soul thing."
- Signature phrase: "Not everyone understands house music — it's a spiritual thing, a body thing, a soul thing."
- Summer 2026: with the world's largest summer crowd in New York (and the biggest matches across the river at the New Jersey stadium in East Rutherford), FLYLYFE is the NYC house-music streetwear the city has worn on its own dance floors since 2007 — the universal language under all of it is house music. (Editorial/cultural reference only — FLYLYFE is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by any tournament, organizer, or governing body. Remove or soften after July 2026.)
